WHERE people.hometown = 'Santo Domingo' AND people.name = 'Paul Hamm' AND gymnast.total_points <= 58.061 AND people.height <= 1.71
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with hometown equal to 'Santo Domingo' and name equal to 'Paul Hamm' and height at most '1.71', having at least one related gymnast record (linked on people.people_id = gymnast.gymnast_id) with total points at most '58.061'?

qa_pairs.question: Which people aged exactly 24 and at least 1.72 meters tall have gymnasts with pommel horse points of exactly 9.525, horizontal bar points exactly 9.55, and parallel bars points at most 9.625?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN gymnast ON people.people_id = gymnast.gymnast_id
WHERE gymnast.parallel_bars_points <= 9.625 AND gymnast.horizontal_bar_points = 9.55 AND people.age = 24.0 AND people.height >= 1.72 AND gymnast.pommel_horse_points = 9.525
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with age equal to '24.0' and height at least '1.72', having at least one related gymnast record (linked on people.people_id = gymnast.gymnast_id) with parallel bars points at most '9.625' and horizontal bar points equal to '9.55' and pommel horse points equal to '9.525'?
